name: cozbil
description: ÇözBil — LGS / YGS / KPSS AI study companion

scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --prefix apps/mobile && npm run typecheck --prefix functions
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix apps/mobile && npm run lint --prefix functions
scripts.test: npm run test --prefix apps/mobile && npm run test --prefix functions && npm run test --prefix scripts/solve-proxy
scripts.qa: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test
